columns.name: game_id
columns.comment: Identifies the specific game for which predictions are being made, allowing easy reference across various analyses and reports.

columns.name: week
columns.comment: Represents the week of the NFL season, providing context for when the game is scheduled.

columns.name: game_type
columns.comment: Indicates the type of game, such as regular season or playoff, which can influence predictions and analysis.

columns.name: gameday
columns.comment: The day of the week on which the game is played, useful for scheduling and historical comparisons.

columns.name: kickoff_et
columns.comment: Specifies the kickoff time in Eastern Time, critical for both audience engagement and logistical planning.

columns.name: away_abbr
columns.comment: Abbreviation of the away team's name, facilitating quick identification in reports and analyses.

columns.name: home_abbr
columns.comment: Abbreviation of the home team's name, allowing for streamlined references in various contexts.

columns.name: away_spread
columns.comment: The point spread for the away team, reflecting their expected performance relative to the home team.

columns.name: home_spread
columns.comment: The point spread for the home team, indicating how much they are favored to win against the away team.

columns.name: total_line
columns.comment: The total points projected to be scored in the game, combining both teams' anticipated scoring.

columns.name: bookmaker
columns.comment: The entity setting the betting lines, providing context for the reliability and source of the predictions.

columns.name: proj_away_score
columns.comment: The projected score for the away team, based on statistical analysis and past performance metrics.

columns.name: proj_home_score
columns.comment: The projected score for the home team, derived from various predictive models and analysis.

columns.name: proj_total
columns.comment: The total projected score combining both teams' predicted scores, essential for understanding game expectations.

columns.name: away_cover_pct
columns.comment: The percentage of times the away team has covered the spread in past games, which can inform betting decisions.

columns.name: home_cover_pct
columns.comment: The percentage of times the home team has covered the spread in previous matchups, useful for evaluating performance.

columns.name: over_pct
columns.comment: Percentage of simulations where the total points scored exceeds the total line, indicating potential for high-scoring outcomes.

columns.name: under_pct
columns.comment: Percentage of simulations where the total points scored is below the total line, suggesting potential for low-scoring games.

columns.name: spread_pick
columns.comment: Indicates the predicted pick for the point spread, serving as a recommendation for bettors.

columns.name: spread_side
columns.comment: Specifies which side of the spread is favored in the predictions, guiding betting strategies.

columns.name: spread_confidence
columns.comment: Quantifies the confidence level in the spread prediction, helping to assess the reliability of the pick.

columns.name: total_pick
columns.comment: Indicates the predicted outcome for the total points scored in the game, guiding decisions on over/under betting.

columns.name: total_confidence
columns.comment: Measures the confidence in the total points prediction, providing insight into the strength of the forecast.

columns.name: n_simulations
columns.comment: The number of simulations run to generate the predictions, reflecting the robustness of the analysis.

columns.name: model_id
columns.comment: Prediction model family (monte_carlo, poisson, elo, epa_margin, line_relative, shrinkage_profile, situational_total, ensemble).

columns.name: prediction_run_id
columns.comment: A unique identifier for the specific run of the prediction model, useful for tracking iterations and improvements.

columns.name: prediction_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for each individual prediction, ensuring traceability and uniqueness in the dataset.

columns.name: season
columns.comment: Indicates the specific NFL season year, contextualizing the game and its predictions within that timeframe.

columns.name: pbp_season
columns.comment: Represents the season for play-by-play data, useful for detailed analysis and comparisons with predictions.

columns.name: predicted_at
columns.comment: Timestamp indicating when the predictions were made, important for understanding the temporal context of the analysis.

columns.name: mlflow_run_id
columns.comment: Identifier related to the MLflow tracking process, useful for linking predictions to experimentation and model management.

columns.name: market_blend
columns.comment: Reflects the blending of different market predictions, providing a comprehensive view of betting expectations.

columns.name: pick_threshold
columns.comment: The threshold value used to differentiate between strong and weak picks, assisting in decision-making for bets.

columns.name: home_field_advantage
columns.comment: Quantifies the advantage associated with playing at home, an important factor in game predictions.

columns.name: random_seed
columns.comment: Used for generating simulations, ensuring reproducibility and consistency in the prediction models.

columns.name: ingested_at
columns.comment: Timestamp indicating when the data was ingested into the system, helpful for tracking data currency and updates.

columns.name: _source_file
columns.comment: The filename of the source data from which these predictions were derived, useful for data lineage and traceability.
